high_issues.detail: eval and evaluate serve entirely different purposes but are name-adjacent. Users typing /eval get eval-driven development, not product idea evaluation.
high_issues.fix: Rename eval → llm-eval or eval-driven. Add cross-reference in both files.

high_issues.detail: multi-* family (5 commands) replicates plan/build-fix/tdd/e2e/orchestrate via external codeagent-wrapper binary with no user-facing disambiguation.
high_issues.fix: Add 'When to use this vs /plan' section to every multi-* command.

medium_issues.detail: Belongs to the instinct family but lacks instinct- prefix. All siblings are instinct-*.
Truncated plural noun while peer is dep-audit (noun-verb). Scope boundary unclear.
medium_issues.fix: Rename to dep-update. Add mutual cross-references.

medium_issues.detail: Bare noun; peer commands use verb-noun pattern (privacy-audit, zero-trust-review).
orchestrator-designer agent exists but has no command. /orchestrate covers runtime use, not design.
sdk-architect agent exists but has no /sdk-design command.
/deploy is missing from the command system.
Share ~40% scope with no cross-reference in deps.md.
medium_issues.fix: Add reciprocal cross-reference to deps.md (dep-audit already has the note).

low_issues.detail: 6 instinct-* wrappers have 1 step each — below the 3-step minimum.
low_issues.fix: Add precondition, execution, and output steps.
Restructure to 4 top-level steps with sub-task Usage variants.
Add Usage sections with format and examples.

low_issues.detail: Routes to language reviewers implicitly; no routing table in command file.
Acronym with no hyphen — only command of this form.
low_issues.fix: Add disambiguation in description or document as intentional exception.
